item.title: It's the unhinged XL Saturday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
i am totally showing this meme to my dad
makes sense
looks suspect
i'm a fan of this for some reason
democracy is beautiful
clever
nice
mood
lemme get some of that 2017 discipline though
i can relate to this because i'm a hardened criminal
good stuff
wonder if that's photoshop or an actual goat/moth hybrid
mmm hmm
obviously
we've all done this but survived
it's a special day
as is tradition
that's my set.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: Every morning and night I send my two adult (22 & 20) sons, their mom, and their SO’s memes as a love note. I send dad jokes/puns, morning jams to guide their day, bizarre memes, words of affirmation, & nightmare fuel. Upvote if you enjoy. Love you all!
item.description:
Be silly today! I love you.
Get up! Wake up! Morning jams!
Eat your veggies or they’ll kick your ass.
I love you. Have a good day, boyos.
Birb is broke. Just like you.
Don’t sass me or I’ll show up to the next function wearing 1979 attire.
Happy birthday ? Sweet dreams. You’ll always remember THIS birthday!
Thank you, bathtub barracuda.
Aww, she looks just like our recently departed Jenny! We miss our doggo.
Sweet dreams!
Get up! Attack the day! Morning jams. May this beat be your rhythm throughout class and work today. It won’t drive you crazy at all! Best after a big cup of coffee or four.
These little fudgers always seem to be mad about something.
Get up! May this be your theme song every time you enter a room today! You’re amazing. I love you.
Cats are the devil’s toe jam. This has nothing to do with my allergies. #Honest
Get yo butt up! Attack the day! May this be your theme song for every obstacle. I believe in you. Love you!
I may start a business like this unless someone stops me.
Aww, Dustin (family downstairs Roomba) COULD take care of little freaks like this.
SCIENCE!
Ah, life in Baltimore and inaccurate stereotypes. Trust people you meet!
I love you, family.
April Fool’s!
Go ahead. Keep wearing black all the time, doofenschmirtzes.
To the maxilotl. Also, my autocorrect is jacked up. I wonder why?
Eh? Eh? Anyone?
I love you! I’m proud of you. Behave today. Or not.
Have a positive outlook even if the Eye of Sauron is upon you!
Kids these days.
Maybe this is why the crawfish is mad?
Perfect matchup. Love your SO!
This is for the T Swift fans out there. And the people who work with tools daily. (Meaning: all of you)
LOL
Birb! Here’s your study music today.
Lime is my favorite.
Get it? Ha ha! Dad joke, hoo ha ha.
Eat your damn food.
This will give you a buzz and the farts.
Dad advice.
I like that you exist. I love you.
Did you enjoy this Superb Owl?
Bad@ss birb
Is this why hibachi is your favorite?
I’ll keep trying to be silly. I’ll up my game.
I love you. Have a good night. Talk to you tomorrow. Love, Dad.
item.dc:creator: Wheretheheckisjason

item.title: It's a fucked up world we live in
item.description: Reminds me of a quote I read. "BDSM teaches you mutual respect and etiquette. Religion teaches you that there are masters and slaves."
item.dc:creator: ReitnesTenought

item.title: No one expects the spanish inquisition
item.dc:creator: DropDrop

item.title: The Void Dumps Back - Episode 8
item.description:
Hope everyone is having a great Caturday!
Stardew Valley farmer has entered th chat...
Free the mouse!
I like slightly cool water. Definitely not cold. Ice is a huge no-go.
Used to drink the little things of cream when I was a kid.
Is it good, though?
It me.
NOOOOOOOOOOOOOO
I have been listening to a lot of podcasts, and oh man, this drives me nuts.
*hugs* Edit - wow guys, never made most viral before. Thanks! If I get to ask for something, um... Just be excellent to each other, please. *individual hugs to everyone that wants one*
item.dc:creator: DaBaDoop

item.title: 4th Cake Day!!
item.description: I hope you enjoyed them as much as I did. If you don't, well let's be honest it's more laughter for me!

item.title: Backlogged memes again
item.description: Imgur is being a jerk about posting with commentary for some reason so have some memes with no commentary at all, idk I have like a three month backlog I’ve been working on my book. This is as good a place as any to drop the link https://tr.ee/XTefRiN_sF

item.title: “Did I leave the stove on ?” “Nah I’m a fucking dog”
item.dc:creator: ExistenceIsPainWasTaken

item.title: SecretHarpy's Meme Library: Volume 22
item.description:
Hello and welcome to yet another meme dump, my imgur friends. It is spring and the trees hate me and my sinuses for daring to exist, but nonetheless I have braved the clouds of pollen to bring you quality funny shit. Oh, and because I know someone is gonna be like, "HEY SECRETHARPY, I'M GONNA NEED SOME VERIFICATION FOR THAT TOP IMAGE" here you go. Have fun reading about this hilarious disaster: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Athletics_at_the_1904_Summer_Olympics_%E2%80%93_Men's_marathon
I told you I braved the pollen, didn't I? Only the best for my good ol' friends on imgur
Or they don't understand the reference. Sad times.
I am too annoying it most certainly is a trap
o m e l e t t e d u f r o m a g e
I sure do too, buddy
hell yeah ladies
anyone wanna start a cult?
¯\_(ツ)_/¯
And as a super pale person, it's either wear layers to block the sun and be human soup, or shed them and be roasted alive by the sun. Fun times.
Do not cite the deep magic to me, I was there when it was written
very fragile pls leave me alone
how terribly accurate!
That's all for this installment folks, I shall see you in the next meme dump. Til' then, stay awesome imgur
item.dc:creator: SecretHarpy

item.title: Phone dump MP: part blahblahblah
item.description:
Send him to mee
LOUBALIN
Seriously. Bad at names.
Practice makes perfect?
Old skool cool
Floofster
'Member Covid? I 'member
I had the big sad for this guy...(Old Country Buffet training video)
Daði Freyr- Think About Things
Sleppp
We really have been spending all our time in a Gangstas Paradise...
Thanks for checking in!
